mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, real_name AS realName, nick_name AS nickName, avatar, phone, email, gender, user_type AS userType, campus_id AS campusId, campus_code AS campusCode, status FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, username, password, real_name AS realName, nick_name AS nickName, avatar, phone, email, gender, user_type AS userType, campus_id AS campusId, campus_code AS campusCode, status FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
